command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length)}' "$STATE_FILE"
echo "Waiting for stop hook to chain through teammate steps..."

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length)}' "$STATE_FILE"

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length), teammates: [.teams["create-team"].teammates // {} | keys[]]}' "$STATE_FILE"

bash -c '
PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.839"
export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/guard.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh"
STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1)
WORKFLOW_FILE=$(jq -r ".workflow_file" "$STATE_FILE")
engine_init "$WORKFLOW_FILE" "$STATE_FILE"
echo "--- Dispatching stop for cursor=$(jq .cursor "$STATE_FILE") ---"
RESULT=$(engine_handle_hook "stop" "{\"session_id\":\"f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a\",\"agent_id\":\"\"}" 2>/dev/null)
echo "$RESULT" | jq .
echo "--- State after ---"
jq "{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | \"\(.id):\(.status)\"], teammates: (.teams[\"create-team\"].teammates | keys)}" "$STATE_FILE"
'

echo "=== State files ===" && for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$sf") cursor=$(jq .cursor "$sf") owner=$(jq -r '.owner_agent_id' "$sf")"; done && echo "" && echo "=== Worker outputs ===" && for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo -n "$w: " && (ls .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md 2>/dev/null && echo "HAS OUTPUT" || echo "no output yet"); done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "=== $w ===" && cat ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" && echo ""; done

steps.output:
## Static Team Test Results

Summary:
null
null

Collected outputs:
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/worker-1/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/worker-1/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/worker-1/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/worker-2/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/worker-2/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/worker-2/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/worker-3/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/worker-3/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/worker-3/result.md

command_log.command: echo '## Static Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.completed_count, .failed_count' && echo '' && echo 'Collected outputs:' && find .wheel/outputs/team-test/results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort

bash -c '
PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.839"
export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/guard.sh"
source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh"
STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775769665_9762.json"
WORKFLOW_FILE=$(jq -r ".workflow_file" "$STATE_FILE")
engine_init "$WORKFLOW_FILE" "$STATE_FILE"
RESULT=$(engine_handle_hook "stop" "{\"session_id\":\"f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a\",\"agent_id\":\"\"}" 2>/dev/null)
echo "$RESULT" | jq -r ".decision"
echo "Cursor: $(jq .cursor "$STATE_FILE")"
echo "Steps: $(jq -r "[.steps[] | \"\(.id):\(.status)\"] | join(\", \")" "$STATE_FILE")"
echo "Teammates: $(jq -r "[.teams[\"create-team\"].teammates | to_entries[] | \"\(.key):\(.value.status)\"] | join(\", \")" "$STATE_FILE")"
'
